auth.token_expired: Session expired, please sign in again
auth.network: Network error, please check the server connection

project.no_lakehouse_schema: Project has no Lakehouse schema yet — import a PBIT or upload data first
project.no_ontology_objects: Project has no Ontology objects (or objects' canonical_query is not solidified)

validation.allowed_tools_must_be_array: allowedTools must be a string array

mcp_key.not_found_or_revoked: Key does not exist or has been revoked

object.property_knowledge_not_deletable: Property knowledge node cannot be deleted here; remove the property in the object's property definitions instead

sql.no_ontology_object: Query does not reference any Ontology object (FROM/JOIN must include at least one Od name)
sql.only_select_with_allowed: Only SELECT / WITH queries are allowed

db.fk_violation: Foreign key constraint violation — related data prevents deletion
